description: 6-axis IMU (3-axis gyroscope + 3-axis accelerometer) with I2C interface

Sensor Config.name: CONFIG
Sensor Config.description: Configures external Frame Synchronization (FSYNC) pin sampling and Digital Low Pass Filter (DLPF) setting for gyroscopes and accelerometers

Sensor Config.name: GYRO_CONFIG
Sensor Config.description: Triggers gyroscope self-test and configures gyroscopes' full scale range

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV0_CTRL
I2C Master.description: Control register for Slave 0 I2C transactions

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_EN
fields.description: Enables Slave 0 for I2C data transaction

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_BYTE_SW
fields.description: Configures byte swapping of word pairs

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_REG_DIS
fields.description: Disables register address write before data transaction

I2C Master.name: I2C_MST_DELAY_CTRL
I2C Master.description: Specify timing of external sensor data shadowing and decrease access rate of slave devices

fields.name: DELAY_ES_SHADOW
fields.description: Delays shadowing of external sensor data until all data has been received

fields.name: I2C_SLV4_DLY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 4 accessed at decreased rate

fields.name: I2C_SLV3_DLY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 3 accessed at decreased rate

fields.name: I2C_SLV2_DLY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 2 accessed at decreased rate

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_DLY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 1 accessed at decreased rate

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_DLY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 0 accessed at decreased rate

quality_issues: outlier field count (8 fields vs median 1.0)
all fields have default RW access (may be missing real access types)
address 0x67 not found in register summary table

Interrupts.name: INT_ENABLE
Interrupts.description: Enables interrupt generation by interrupt sources

Interrupts.name: INT_STATUS
Interrupts.description: Interrupt status of each interrupt generation source

System.name: SIGNAL_PATH_RESET
System.description: Reset analog and digital signal paths of gyroscope, accelerometer, and temperature sensors

fields.name: GYRO_RESET
fields.description: Resets gyroscope analog and digital signal paths

fields.name: ACCEL_RESET
fields.description: Resets accelerometer analog and digital signal paths

fields.name: TEMP_RESET
fields.description: Resets temperature sensor analog and digital signal paths

quality_issues: address 0x68 not found in register summary table
